notes: Scenario corpus has 12 tests covering SSO onboarding, provisioning design, mapping correctness, lifecycle drift, rotation safety, edge-case constraints, out-of-scope rejection, low-confidence escalation, and shared-meta-agent fallback.
All strict validation gates are met with pass_rate >= minimum_pass_rate, accuracy_acceptance_met=true, and explicit human verification recorded.
Package is aligned to issue #139 validated claim and keeps the specialty boundary inside business-application identity integration rather than broad identity architecture or software engineering.
